description: Workspace extensions infrastructure (P2-20): Add tags, attachments, and custom fields schema + CRUD + UI. Tags can be assigned to players/tournaments/notes. Attachments link files to entities. Custom fields allow user-defined data on player cards.
steps: Add new tables to app/db/schema.py: (1) tags table: id, name TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, color TEXT, created_at. (2) entity_tags table: id, tag_id INTEGER FK tags, entity_type TEXT NOT NULL, entity_id TEXT NOT NULL, created_at, UNIQUE(tag_id, entity_type, entity_id). (3) attachments table: id, entity_type TEXT NOT NULL, entity_id TEXT NOT NULL, file_path TEXT NOT NULL, file_name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, file_size INTEGER, created_at. (4) custom_fields table: id, name TEXT NOT NULL, field_type TEXT NOT NULL (text/number/date/select), options_json TEXT, sort_order INTEGER, is_active INTEGER DEFAULT 1, created_at. (5) custom_field_values table: id, custom_field_id INTEGER FK custom_fields, player_id INTEGER FK players, value TEXT, created_at, updated_at, UNIQUE(custom_field_id, player_id).

Add migration logic in schema.py initialize_schema() to create new tables if they don't exist (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pattern, same as existing tables). Add indexes: idx_entity_tags_entity ON entity_tags(entity_type, entity_id), idx_attachments_entity ON attachments(entity_type, entity_id), idx_custom_field_values_player ON custom_field_values(player_id).

Create app/services/tags.py: CRUD functions - create_tag(connection, name, color=None) -> int, list_tags(connection) -> list[TagRecord], assign_tag(connection, tag_id, entity_type, entity_id), remove_tag_assignment(connection, tag_id, entity_type, entity_id), list_entity_tags(connection, entity_type, entity_id) -> list[TagRecord]. TagRecord dataclass: id, name, color, created_at.

Create app/services/attachments.py: CRUD functions - create_attachment(connection, entity_type, entity_id, file_path, file_name, description=None, file_size=None) -> int, list_entity_attachments(connection, entity_type, entity_id) -> list[AttachmentRecord], delete_attachment(connection, attachment_id). AttachmentRecord dataclass: id, entity_type, entity_id, file_path, file_name, description, file_size, created_at.

Create app/services/custom_fields.py: CRUD functions - create_custom_field(connection, name, field_type, options_json=None) -> int, list_custom_fields(connection, active_only=True) -> list[CustomFieldRecord], set_field_value(connection, custom_field_id, player_id, value) -> int, get_player_custom_values(connection, player_id) -> list[CustomFieldValueRecord], delete_custom_field(connection, field_id). CustomFieldRecord dataclass: id, name, field_type, options_json, sort_order, is_active, created_at. CustomFieldValueRecord dataclass: id, field_id, field_name, field_type, value, created_at.

Create app/ui/tags_widget.py: a reusable QWidget that shows assigned tags as colored labels (QLabel with background-color from tag.color) and an 'add tag' button that opens a small dialog to pick or create a tag. Used inside PlayerCardDialog 'Общее' tab replacing the placeholder.

Create app/ui/attachments_widget.py: a reusable QWidget showing a list of attachments (file_name, description) with 'Прикрепить' button (QFileDialog to select file, copies to profile_root/attachments/ directory) and 'Удалить' button. Used in PlayerCardDialog 'История' tab replacing the placeholder.

Create app/ui/custom_fields_widget.py: a reusable QWidget that shows custom field values for a player as QFormLayout rows (field_name: value_edit). Has a 'Управление полями' button that opens a dialog to create/edit/delete custom field definitions. Used in PlayerCardDialog 'Общее' tab replacing the placeholder.

Write tests in tests/test_workspace_extensions.py: test tag CRUD (create, list, assign, remove, list_entity_tags), test attachment CRUD (create, list, delete), test custom field CRUD (create field, set value, get values, delete field), test schema migration creates new tables correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Schema includes tags, entity_tags, attachments, custom_fields, custom_field_values tables
app/services/custom_fields.py provides full custom field CRUD
UI widgets exist for tags, attachments, and custom fields
PlayerCardDialog integrates the new widgets in appropriate tabs
python -m pytest -q --tb=short passes including new tests
findings: All acceptance criteria met. mypy: 0 errors. pytest: 136 passed, 63 skipped, 14 deselected, 14 subtests passed. Schema adds 5 new tables (tags, entity_tags, attachments, custom_fields, custom_field_values) with indexes. Service layer provides full CRUD for all three domains. UI widgets (TagsWidget, AttachmentsWidget, CustomFieldsWidget) are integrated into PlayerCardDialog replacing the placeholder labels. Updated test_player_card_v2.py to verify new widgets instead of placeholder text. Qt UI tests skip in headless environment (libGL.so.1 missing, same pattern as all other Qt smoke tests).
